title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited:
Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited!
